original_snippet_context: News report on the Caixa de Conversão project.
relevant_quote: Vindo do Senado, chegou hontem á Camara o projecto creando a caixa de conversão, com as emendas daquella casa do Congresso.
justification: This excerpt simply reports on the project's progression through the legislative process without expressing any opinion on its merits or proposed conversion rate.
